mission.title: argo: feat: auto-refresh on new revisions during sync retries (Alpha) (#11494)
mission.description:
This feature allows users to configure their apps to refresh on new revisions, when the current sync is retrying.
This is controlled by a new boolean Application CRD field `syncPolicy.retry.refresh` or via the `--sync-retry-refresh` flag.

Closes https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/issues/11494
Related to https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/issues/6055
Discussed at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=baIX9Bk6f5w&t=1173s 

Initially based of the work Sayrus did at https://github.com/Sayrus/argo-cd/commit/817bc3449768021d0d5ad7f1ce7510bcd9d2f486

Checklist:

* [x] Either (a) I've created an [enhancement proposal](https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/issues/new/choose) and discussed it with the community, (b) this is a bug fix, or (c) this does not need to be in the release notes.
* [x] The title of the PR states what changed and the related issues number (used for the release note).
* [x] The title of the PR conforms to the [Toolchain Guide](https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/latest/developer-

resolution.summary: Hey @aslafy-z , thank you for this PR, really amazing feature. I have tried to test it , and it not really works for me, I have guestbook application with simple PreSync hook ```apiVersion: batch/v1 kind: Job metadata: name: before annotations: argocd.argoproj.io/hook: PreSync argocd.argoproj.io/hook-delete-policy: BeforeHookCreation spec: template: spec: containers: - name: sleep image: alpine:latest command: ["sleep", "30", "exit", "1"] restartPolicy: Never backoffLimit: 0 ``` And once i am doing new commit, i am almost immediately getting such error
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request

Hi there, Zadkiel here. I originally signed up to talk about this topic in the contributor meeting but finally could not make it.
Here is the recording: https://youtu.be/tJYxtn3cO6E?t=1087
This is a very annoying missing feature on the ArgoCD side that in my opinion breaks the experience of auto-sync.

Please give feedback so we can iterate on this topic! 🙏
Hey @aslafy-z , thank you for this PR, really amazing feature. 
I have tried to test it , and it not really works for me, 

I have guestbook application with simple PreSync hook

And once i am doing new commit, i am almost immediately getting such error @pasha-codefresh Thank you for giving attention to this PR. I reported in the PR comments that it was not triggering refresh when processing hooks: https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/pull/15603#discussion_r1340694530 I'm not sure how to resolve it, and would like some experimented contributor or maintainer to help here. Looking forward to seeing this merged, even if it doesn't cover all the use cases :-) Sorry @aslafy-z , missed it! @aslafy-z PR looks good to me, could you please add documentation about this feature? https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/stable/user-guide/auto_sync/ @todaywasawesome I applied the required change. @pasha-codefresh I added a sparse documentation for the feature, let me know if it's OK to you. I also added the `argocd app set --sync-retry-refresh` flag. I will fix the tests asap @aslafy-z any news? hey @aslafy-z , are you going to work on it? I think your test case shouldnt wait for `Failed` state because patched selector will not be applied and you will stuck at `Running` state.
